'''Ground-eels''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of animal found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] that made fluting courtship calls when attempting to find a [[Reproduction/Legends|mate]].<ref name="RC:HC" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which include the mention of ground-eels, in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] heard the mating calls of several ground-[[Eel/Legends|eels]] while she was hiding in a field of [[barq]] on Qiilura.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Weed-eels were mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}}
